title: Shopify Development
summary: Custom Shopify stores, themes, product experiences, integrations, and technical improvements for modern ecommerce brands.
description: I build Shopify stores from the ground up and improve existing stores with custom Liquid, responsive sections, product architecture, and conversion-focused user journeys.
My approach connects brand presentation with practical ecommerce requirements such as variants, payments, delivery information, customer support, and mobile performance.
outcomes: A store that feels aligned with the brand
A cleaner product and purchase journey
Editable sections the business can manage
